creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Installing/compiling port net/samba4 fails on FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT/amd64 (CLANG) box with the follwoing error/linker error:

How-To-Repeat: Try to compile on a most recent (r247188) FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT/amd64 system with CLANG as standard compiler
